creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Did you know about this secret garden right by the River Thames in Chelsea? It’s London’s oldest botanical garden, established in 1673, home to over 4,500 medicinal, edible and useful plants! You’ll find 100 year old glasshouses here and 4 acres of beautiful green space, as well as a gorgeous cafe and gift shop!

It’s one of our favourite spots of chill out in London, whatever the season.

📍 @chelsea_physic_garden 66 Royal Hospital Rd, London SW3 4HS
⏰ Open: Sunday – Friday, 11am – 5pm.
🎟️ Tickets: £5 – £15

#chelseaphysicgarden #secretgarden

transcription.text: Did you know that there's a secret garden right by the River Thames that hardly anyone knows about? You'll find it on Swan Walk and it is absolutely breathtaking. It's actually London's oldest botanical garden, established in 1673 by the Society of Apothecaries, and it's now home to over 4,500 medicinal, edible and useful plants. Here you'll also find historic glasshouses that are over 100 years old, and it's just the perfect spot to relax and enjoy four acres of green space in central London. They also have a gorgeous cafe on site, as well as the prettiest shop. It's called Chelsea Physic Garden and it is an absolute hidden gem. Find all the details in the caption.
